projects.title: TaskFlow API
projects.desc: REST API backend for task management with real-time notifications and role-based access.
projects.overview: A production-grade REST API built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL, featuring JWT authentication, role-based access control, real-time WebSocket notifications, and comprehensive task management. Designed with clean architecture principles and fully documented with OpenAPI/Swagger.
highlights: JWT-based auth with role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Member)
WebSocket real-time notifications for task assignments and status changes
Async database operations with SQLAlchemy 2.0 and connection pooling
Redis-backed caching layer reducing average response time by 40%
Comprehensive test suite with 95%+ coverage using Pytest
Docker Compose setup for local development and CI/CD pipeline

projects.title: ShopNext
projects.desc: Full-stack e-commerce platform with headless cart, Stripe checkout, and admin dashboard.
projects.overview: A fully headless e-commerce platform where Django handles product catalogue, inventory, orders, and payments, while Next.js delivers a blazing-fast storefront with SSR, ISR, and edge-cached product pages. Stripe powers secure checkout with webhook-based order confirmation.
highlights: Next.js App Router with ISR — product pages rebuild in <1s after stock updates
Django REST Framework API with nested serializers and custom permission classes
Stripe Checkout integration with webhook listener for order state transitions
Custom admin dashboard in Next.js for order management and inventory control
Optimistic cart updates on the client with server-side validation fallback

projects.title: DataPulse
projects.desc: Real-time analytics dashboard ingesting 500k events/day via WebSocket streaming.
projects.overview: A high-performance real-time analytics platform that ingests, processes, and visualizes 500k+ events per day. Built with FastAPI for the backend streaming layer and React for the dashboard, featuring live-updating charts, anomaly detection alerts, and customizable metric widgets.
highlights: WebSocket-based streaming pipeline processing 500k+ events/day with <100ms latency
ClickHouse columnar database for sub-second analytical queries on billions of rows
Configurable dashboard with drag-and-drop metric widgets and time-range selectors
Anomaly detection using rolling Z-score algorithm with real-time Slack alerts
Batch + streaming hybrid architecture for historical backfill and live data
Horizontal scaling with Kubernetes — tested up to 2M events/day
